_comments.AzureWebJobsStorage: Routes storage operations to Azurite. Start Azurite before running: npx azurite --silent --location .azurite
_comments.Telemetry__ApiKey: Use any non-empty string. Callers must send the same value in the X-Api-Key header.
_comments.ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection: Point to LocalDB, Docker SQL Server, or a shared dev instance. Dapper requires a real SQL Server -- EF Core in-memory is not supported.
